positive: A vibrant, stylized minimalist design featuring a playful, geometric fox peering through stylized floral arches. The fox should have a sharp, clean silhouette against a complementary gradient background. Use a color palette of sapphire blue, emerald green, burnt orange, and creamy ivory. The composition must be centered, highly symmetrical, and suitable for all-over screen printing on apparel. The style should be a blend of neo-folkloric illustration and mid-century modern aesthetics, with crisp line work and flat color blocking. Include subtle halftone dot patterns in the background for texture, but keep the main subject distinct and impactful. --ar 1:1
negative: blurry, text, watermark, low resolution, signature, noisy, dirty, artifacts, extra limbs, malformed hands, poorly drawn face, cartoonish, photo-realistic, ugly, abstract, cropped
